title: White & Case, AZB, Sullivan, Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas act on Sun Pharma's $11.75 billion acquisition of Organon
description: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited has acquired Organon & Co in an all‑cash deal, valuing Organon at $11.75 billion.The acquisition will be made through Sun Pharmaceutical Holdings a U.S. subsidiary of Sun Pharma.According to the release after this deal, Sun Pharma will one of the 25 largest pharma companies in the world with a $12.4 Billion revenue. https://sunpharma.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Press-Release-Sun-Pharma-signs-Definitive-Agreement-to-Acquire-Organon.pdfAZB, Khaitan, Tou
